docs.title: Bibliography conventions
docs.text:
• .bib reference: Overleaf/BibLaTeX
  • Bibliography file as YAML: bibliography.yml
    • Every entry has a type and id item.
    • Remaining as for usual bib file.

docs.title: Values and formats
docs.text:
• authors as list
  • e-book vs. hardcover Use e-book values. Often fields date and isbn.
  • date in ISO 8601.

docs.title: Design
docs.text:
• mkdocs-material Setup from goessl/templates.
  • bibliography as YAML: bibliography.yml
    • Single source of truth.
    • Common format that is easy to maintain and machine readable and convertible.
  • Hook: gen.py
    • Validates the YAML on every build.
    • Exports to JSON for Tabulator to read.
  • Tabulator.js Needed for advanced formatting and filtering (especially because of authors column, which contains an array).

docs.title: Roadmap
docs.text:
• Load from single source of truth
  • Filtering
  • Deploy
  • Complete bibliography
  • Perfectly use material for tabulator styling
  • Improved filtering (checkbox list for authors, date and edition number ranges)
  • Subject tags
  • Author list with additional information like homepage
  • Production
  • Ballin
